note: Order-3 heptagonal tiling {7,3} — three regular heptagons meet at each vertex. The basis of Escher's Circle Limit woodcuts. Regular (isohedral). Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Order-3 octagonal tiling {8,3} — three regular octagons meet at each vertex. Large, open octagons. Regular (isohedral). Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Order-4 pentagonal tiling {5,4} — four regular pentagons meet at each vertex. Regular (isohedral). Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Order-5 square tiling {4,5} — five squares meet at each vertex. A curved, dense grid. Regular (isohedral). Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Truncated order-3 heptagonal tiling t{7,3} — vertex figure 3.14.14 (one triangle, two tetradecagons). Uniform: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Triheptagonal tiling r{7,3} — vertex figure 3.7.3.7, triangles and heptagons alternating. Uniform: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).

Rhombitriheptagonal tiling rr{7,3} — vertex figure 3.4.7.4 (triangle, square, heptagon, square). Uniform: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).

Truncated order-8 triangular tiling t{3,8} — vertex figure 6.6.8 (two hexagons, one octagon). Uniform: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Rhombitrioctagonal tiling rr{8,3} — vertex figure 3.4.8.4 (triangle, square, octagon, square). Uniform: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Truncated trioctagonal tiling tr{8,3} — vertex figure 4.6.16 (square, hexagon, hexadecagon). Uniform: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
Truncated order-4 pentagonal tiling t{5,4} — vertex figure 4.10.10 (one square, two decagons). Uniform: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).

Snub triheptagonal tiling sr{7,3} — vertex figure 3.3.3.3.7 (four triangles, one heptagon). Uniform and chiral: non-isohedral, vertex-transitive, no mirror symmetry. Rendered in the Poincaré disk (float).
